ResearchProjectDef.label: Food Process
ResearchProjectDef.description: Develop industrial food disintegration, liquid toner storage, nutrient paste synthesis, and printed food distribution systems.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Simple Meal Printing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Teach food printers to shape stored toner into stable simple meals.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Fine Meal Printing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Upgrade food printers to synthesize refined fine meals, including standard, vegetarian, and carnivore variants.

ResearchProjectDef.label: Lavish Meal Printing
ResearchProjectDef.description: Upgrade food printers to synthesize lavish meals and their specialized variants for the finest printed dining.
